evals.prompt: Review this PR for architecture quality. Pay special attention to whether I/O, orchestration, and core algorithms are separated.
evals.expected_output: Findings-first review that flags god classes/modules, mixed I/O and domain logic, hidden global state, and missing tests around boundaries.

evals.prompt: Review this diff for memory leaks, repeated copies, and performance risks.
evals.expected_output: Findings-first review covering unclosed resources, unbounded caches, repeated deep copies, hot-loop allocations, blocking I/O, N+1 or quadratic behavior, and measurement suggestions.

evals.prompt: Review the staged changes and tell me how to split commits and write high-quality commit messages.
evals.expected_output: Commit hygiene guidance that groups logical changes, excludes unrelated/generated files, recommends Conventional Commit messages, and keeps history/GitLens view clean.
